curl 'https://web.telegram.org/a/rlottie-wasm.wasm' \
    --compressed \
    -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10.15; rv:133.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/133.0' \
    -H 'Accept: */*' \
    -H 'Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5' \
    -H 'Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd' \
    -H 'Referer: https://web.telegram.org/a/9722.542e50c5fad827ad4715.js' \
    -H 'Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty' \
    -H 'Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors' \
    -H 'Sec-Fetch-Site: same-origin' \
    -H 'Connection: keep-alive' \
    --output was.wasm
